generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed control system interfaced with Vedder Electronic Speed Controller via Jetson Orin Nano, converting desired speed commands into motor voltage signals for real-time vehicle acceleration/deceleration control."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism integrated into the lower-level chassis responsible for directional control, receiving steering angle commands from the Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 middleware."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental mapping LiDAR providing real-time point cloud data for object detection and spatial awareness at ~10-30Hz refresh rate."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "RGB-D camera providing depth perception and visual object tracking data for perception tasks, integrated with Jetson NX autonomy components."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraFrames
]

instance EgoVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor suite (wheel encoders + IMU) providing real-time ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "ROS2-published point cloud data stream transmitted from LiDAR to Digital Twin Entity for perception processing."
]

instance DepthCameraFrames : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "ROS2-published depth camera frames transmitted from camera to Digital Twin Entity for visual perception tasks."
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "ROS2-published ego vehicle state updates (speed, steering angle) transmitted at perception cycle frequency (~10-30Hz)."
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Structured object track data (position, velocity) generated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering on Physical Twin, transmitted to Digital Twin Entity."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based outlier removal and Kalman Filter state estimation model for object tracking in point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance AccControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I compliant ACC logic model computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and relative velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNano
]

instance DataStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database schema for storing ego vehicle state and object track timeseries data with structured query capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering pipeline combining ROS2 visualization tools with custom Python/C++ shaders for real-time object track and path visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ActuationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Voltage signal conversion model mapping desired speed commands to motor control signals for the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed point cloud data after DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering, used for object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance DepthCameraDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth camera frames with object segmentation masks, used for visual perception tasks."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraFrames
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationModel
]

instance EgoVehicleStateProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and synchronized ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) at consistent 10-30Hz update rate."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTracksProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object track data containing position, velocity, and confidence estimates for all detected vehicles/obstacles."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 Humble framework providing inter-node communication, lifecycle management, and service orchestration across Physical and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano edge device hosting Digital Twin Entity with 256-core GPU for perception and control computations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PythonDataProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment for rapid prototyping of perception algorithms and data processing pipelines."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for implementing perception algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman Filter) and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, AccControlModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured query database for persistent storage of vehicle state and object track timeseries data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service displaying ego vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path via 3D UI using ROS2 + custom Python/C++ rendering."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic execution service running on Digital Twin Entity (cloud/edge) to reduce computational load on Physical Twin's constrained hardware."
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Geographically remote control interface enabling ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides AccEnableDisableAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation service creating human-readable CSV/JSON timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisReportInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for operator monitoring and debugging."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected vehicles/obstacles with position and velocity vectors for situational awareness."
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic detection of lead vehicle in front of ego vehicle using point cloud data and tracking models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of ego vehicle speed based on lead vehicle distance and relative velocity according to ACC logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AccEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control action to enable/disable Adaptive Cruise Control functionality via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control action to set desired cruising speed for the ego vehicle via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking command issued via Control Panel UI to stop the ego vehicle rapidly."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries report of vehicle performance metrics (fuel economy, speed patterns) for post-operation analysis."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations based on object track collision risks and vehicle state anomalies."
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed across the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle's hardware including Jetson NX, sensors, and actuators, operating under ROS2 middleware."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator
]

// C5: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on Jetson Orin Nano edge device hosting perception models, control logic, and visualization services."
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, JetsonOrinNano, PythonDataProcessing, MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase
]

// C7: User Entity
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity hosted on developer workstation/cloud server providing remote management and visualization interfaces."
    base:contains RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual Digital Twin to the physical twin include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling Functional Entity (FE)** in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** to the **Actuation FE** on the PT.
  - **Emergency braking commands** sent directly to the **Vedder Speed Controller** via the **Actuation FE** to halt the vehicle.
  - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage commands) derived from the DT's control logic, executed by the PT's **Electronic Control Unit (ECU)**."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Perception cycle frequency**: ~10-30 Hz (LiDAR/camera sensor refresh rates).
  - **Control loop latency**: ≤100 ms end-to-end (vehicle-to-DT-to-vehicle) to comply with **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Hardware-constrained to **100 ms accuracy** (deviations from stricter automotive standards due to 1/10-scale prototype limitations).
  - **Data storage updates**: Near-real-time (~1-5 Hz) for ego vehicle state and object tracks into a **SQL database** for reporting."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is organized as a **three-entity architecture** based on ISO 23247, with modifications:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **pre-processing FEs** (DBSCAN, Kalman Filter). Deployed on the PT's **Jetson NX** and onboard sensors.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **control logic (ACC)**, **data collection**, **reporting**, and **storage FEs**. Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (edge) or cloud server.
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel UI** for remote management. Deployed on a **separate machine** (developer workstation/cloud).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** (ROS2 serialization, unit conversion) bridges all entities via **Wi-Fi** and **ROS2 network**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers **design, development, and operational phases** of the ACC system:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC logic (ISO 15622 compliance) and testing remote management commands.
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **troubleshooting** via real-time data monitoring and report generation for developers.
  - **Operational Phase**: Supports **remote management** and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., emergency braking, speed adjustments) during vehicle operation. The DT represents the **as-operated** state of the PT, not the as-designed or as-manufactured phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin's fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-Time Data Synchronization**: **ROS2** ensures low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between PT and DT, with **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** for event ordering.
  - **Perception Accuracy**: **DBSCAN + Kalman Filter** for object tracking reduces noise in LiDAR/camera data, validated via manual inspection of 3D visualizations.
  - **Control Logic Validation**: ACC logic adheres to **ISO 15622 Performance Class I**, tested on the 1/10-scale PT for **no road curvature** scenarios.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: No explicit uncertainty quantification is documented, but **real-time data monitoring** allows operators to detect anomalies (e.g., sensor failures).
  - **Verification Mechanisms**: **Unit tests** for ROS2 nodes, **integration tests** for end-to-end latency, and **manual validation** of UI outputs (3D visualizations, reports)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin's technical connection to the Physical Twin includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (Digital Twin Entity ↔ Physical Twin Entity ↔ User Entity).
  - **Intra-Entity Communication**: **ROS2 topics/services** for local node-to-node communication within each entity.
  - **Data Translation**: **ROS2 serialization** (e.g., Protobuf) for structuring data streams, with **unit conversions** (e.g., LiDAR coordinates to vehicle-centric frames).
  - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end delay** (vehicle-to-DT-to-vehicle) to comply with **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Hardware-constrained to **±100 ms accuracy** (deviates from stricter automotive standards due to prototype limitations)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on an **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (edge device) or a **cloud server** for compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic, reporting).
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **1/10-scale autonomous vehicle**, with **Jetson NX** running ROS2 and perception algorithms.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a **separate machine** (developer workstation or cloud) running a **web-based UI** (Python/Flask or ROS2 Dashboard).
  - **Data Storage**: **SQL database** hosted on the **Digital Twin Entity** or a **separate server** for persistence.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** deployed on all entities for interoperability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Information Systems**: No explicit integration is documented, but the **ROS2 middleware** enables potential connections to **vehicle telematics platforms**, **cloud analytics services**, or **third-party ADAS tools**.
  - **Standardized Protocols**: Future work may adopt **OPC UA** for interoperability with enterprise systems (e.g., manufacturing DTs under ISO 23247).
  - **Simulation Tools**: **MATLAB/Simulink** integrates with **CREO Simulate** (as referenced in related work) for advanced simulation capabilities, though not explicitly used in this case study."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations are not explicitly addressed in the document, but the following can be inferred:
  - **Data Ownership**: Likely owned by the **vehicle operator/developer** (e.g., McMaster University) given the **publicly available artifacts** and **research context**.
  - **Privacy Implications**: **Real-time ego vehicle state data** (speed, steering angle) and **object tracks** could contain sensitive information if deployed in real-world scenarios. No encryption or access controls are documented.
  - **Ethical Use**: The system is designed for **research and development** (1/10-scale prototype), not production use, reducing immediate privacy risks. Future deployments would require **GDPR/automotive data protection compliance**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: **Part 2 Reference Architecture** serves as the foundational framework, with adaptations for automotive use (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity** extension).
  - **ISO 15622**: **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) specifications** for Performance Class I (no road curvature) compliance.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Service requirements for V2V communication**, including **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** and **clock synchronization** constraints.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Not used in this case study**, but referenced as a potential future extension for standardized data translation.
  - **ROS2**: **Middleware standard** for interoperability, though not a DT-specific standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Remote Operation Risks**: The **Human-in-the-Loop (Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy)** design allows operators to intervene, but **emergency braking commands** could cause unintended vehicle stops if misused.
  - **Cybersecurity**: No explicit security measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) are documented for **Wi-Fi communication** or **ROS2 network**. Vulnerabilities could arise from **unauthorized access** to the **Control Panel UI** or **data streams**.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**: **Real-time latency constraints (≤100 ms)** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** mitigate timing-related failures. However, **no formal safety certification** (e.g., ISO 26262) is applied due to the **1/10-scale prototype** nature.
  - **Ethical Deployment**: The system is designed for **research purposes** and does not address **human safety** in real-world scenarios (e.g., no fail-safes for autonomous operation). Future deployments would require **functional safety standards**."
]
